summary: Full free-form sweep + tutorial walkthrough on dev-e60254a (post v1.1.0-candidate architectural reorg). All six trust points hold and both fails from qa-20260507-094855 are confirmed fixed: duplicate --subteam now returns 422 with the named offending index (postgres unique-constraint translation), and team update --patch-json '{"protocol":null}' now rejects with a clean 422 'protocol: must not be null' (no phantom :reset-protocol recovery hint). Vendor TUI hints (ready_marker/exit_command/trust_response) are surfaced server-side per agent_type and exposed as a stable key set in run view.

Full free-form sweep + tutorial walkthrough on dev-1cc9ea2. All prior fixes hold (no stray-positional swallowing, run stop idempotent, run capture --lines bound, run tell ambiguous content rejected). Two fails: NEW — duplicate --subteam returns bare "error: 500 Internal server error" (Trust 3 envelope missing detail; should be 422 with named offender); REGRESSION-PERSISTING — protocol:null error still embeds phantom ":reset-protocol" recovery hint.

Full free-form sweep + tutorial walkthrough on dev-b4c40c5. All prior regressions stay fixed (run capture --lines negative bound, stray-positional swallowing on version/team list/run list/auth status, run stop idempotency). Two new fails: (1) `team update --patch-json '{"protocol":null}'` appends a recovery hint with a phantom ':reset-protocol' token (Trust 3 violation + inconsistent with --help), (2) `run tell` silently picks the positional arg and discards piped stdin when both are supplied.

Full free-form sweep + tutorial walkthrough on dev-7ca39b6. Prior stop-idempotency regression is fixed. Two new fails: run capture --lines silently accepts negative values (out-of-range bounds not loud, unlike team list --page-size), and tutorial does not walk team create/update/delete/star/unstar or any error envelope.

Tutorial walkthrough + full team/run lifecycle pass on dev-01e85e9; the two prior stray-positional fails are fixed. One new fail: `clier run stop --help` claims idempotency but a second stop on an already-stopped run returns error 1.

Tutorial walkthrough (Phase 1 + Phase 2) and full team/run lifecycle pass; 3 fail findings — `clier version` and `clier team list` silently swallow stray positional args, and the tutorial omits unstar/reset-protocol/delete/failure-path coverage.
